title: VR experience | Immersion plus | [FABRIC] - [ 1.21.4!!]
description: This modpack contains mods that add improved sounds, animations, effects, and more stable performance for a full ViveCraft experience.
body:

# VR experience Immersion plus
A modpack dedicated to immersion and performance enhancement


The version 1.21.1 is recommended for the full experience


This modpack contains mods that improve performance to have stable FPS.
Explore with this modpack to have a complete VR experience.
Contains TexturePack to increase life within the world.

## Remember:
> Go to Settings and give at least 4 GB memory but the recommended is 6 or 8 GB.
> (In the client-side version 4gb is recommended)
> Start Steam VR and then your Minecraft Instance. If no Vr Headset is found it will start without VR.
 

## This modpack contains like:
- ImmersiveMC😲:
  ![https://github.com/hammy275/immersive-mc/blob/1.21.4/docs/ImmersiveMCVRBag.gif?raw=true](https://github.com/hammy275/immersive-mc/blob/1.21.4/docs/ImmersiveMCVRBag.gif?raw=true)
- Eating Animation🍕: 
  ![https://i.imgur.com/lUafo7V.gif](https://i.imgur.com/lUafo7V.gif)
- AND MORE...
